concerns.text: Task T014 implements 'repeated-measures ANOVA or Friedman test' per spec FR-006, but the plan.md Summary and Complexity Tracking explicitly mandate a 'Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test' due to deterministic outputs. The tasks do not reflect the plan's chosen methodology, creating a coverage gap where the implementation will contradict the approved plan.

Task T025 requires performing 'repeated-measures ANOVA or Friedman test' and writing the p-value. This contradicts the plan.md (Complexity Tracking) which rejects ANOVA in favor of Wilcoxon. There is no task to implement the Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test as required by the plan, leaving the statistical analysis requirement of the plan uncovered.

Task T017 implements a 'single-strategy' evaluation loop for US-1. However, US-1 acceptance scenarios and FR-002 require the system to process queries against the three distinct store configurations (Coarse, Medium, Fine) to generate meaningful data. A single-strategy loop cannot satisfy the requirement to compare granularity effects, leaving the core research function of US-1 partially uncovered.

Task T026 addresses FR-008 (exclusion stats) but does not explicitly cover the requirement to verify that the exclusion is 'not correlated with specific session types or visual complexity' as stated in FR-008. The task only mentions generating a JSON report of distribution, missing the correlation analysis requirement.
